title: Compact ores port
description: [Unofficial] Port of Compact Ores Mod for Newer Versions of Minecraft
body:
**[Unofficial] Port of DoubleNegation's [Compact Ores](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/compact-ores) Mod for Newer Versions of Minecraft**


***

## 📖 Description

Compact Ores Port adds **compact ores** to the world — rare variants of regular ores that drop **3–5× more resources** when mined. They generate naturally alongside their base ores and are visually distinct thanks to auto-generated textures.

The mod faithfully recreates the original's functionality and is compatible with **any modded ores** through configuration files. Both **Forge** and **Fabric** versions are available.

![preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab2b9de25136c92f4b9c60f9f556435b9ca7dc7.png)

***

## ✨ Features

*   🪨 **Compact Ores** — rare ore variants with increased drops (×3–5 by default)
*   ⚙️ **In-Game Config Screen** — full settings GUI with tooltips (Mods → Compact Ores Port → Config)
*   🔍 **Ore Browser** - View and add blocks from any mod as compact ore directly in the game by pressing the **__(K)__** key.
*   🔄 **Hot Reload** — changes apply instantly via `/compactores reload`, no restart needed
*   🎨 **Automatic Texture Generation** — the mod creates textures for all compact ores at startup
*   🌍 **Retro Generation** — compact ores appear even in already-explored chunks
*   📦 **Modded Ore Support** — works with any mod that adds ores; auto-discovers ores from installed mod JARs
*   🏷️ **Creative Tab** — a dedicated tab in the creative menu with all registered compact ores
*   🌐 **Localization** — full Russian and English language support

***

## 🔧 Configuration

All settings are accessible through the in-game config screen with hover tooltips:

| Setting               |Description                                         |Default |
| --------------------- |--------------------------------------------------- |------- |
| Min Rolls             |Minimum drop multiplier                             |3       |
| Max Rolls             |Maximum drop multiplier                             |5       |
| Spawn Probability     |Chance for an ore to be replaced by compact variant |10%     |
| Generate Textures     |Automatically create compact ore textures           |ON      |
| Retro Generation      |Generate compact ores in existing chunks            |ON      |
| Color Difference Mode |Texture generation algorithm (Shading-Aware)        |ON      |
| Late Generation       |For ores added by worldgen after the standard phase |OFF     |
| Use GetDrops          |Alternative drop calculation method                 |OFF     |

Individual ores can be **enabled/disabled**, and new ores can be added from any installed mod via the **Ore Browser** screen.

***

## 📂 Supported Versions

| Minecraft |Forge |Fabric |
| --------- |----- |------ |
| 1.19.2    |✅     |✅      |
| 1.20.1    |✅     |✅      |
| 1.21.1    |✅     |✅      |
| 1.21.4    |✅     |✅      |
| 1.21.8    |✅     |✅      |
| 1.21.10   |✅     |✅      |
| 1.21.11   |✅     |✅      |

***

## 📥 Installation

1.  Install **Forge** or **Fabric** (+ Fabric API) for your Minecraft version
2.  Download the matching mod JAR file
3.  Place it in the `.minecraft/mods/` folder
4.  Launch the game — compact ores will generate automatically

***

## 💡 Tips

*   Use `/compactores reload` to apply config changes without restarting
*   Open the **Ore Config** screen to enable/disable specific ores or adjust per-ore settings
*   The **Ore Browser** lets you add ores from any installed mod with one click
*   Config files are stored in `.minecraft/config/compactores/` as TOML — editable by hand if needed
